title: NullTrue should not be used on string-based fields in Django models
description: Avoid using NullBooleanField on string-based fields in Django models, as it can lead to unexpected behavior.
message: Avoid using NullBooleanField on string-based fields in Django models
recommendation: Use a CharField or related field type instead of NullBooleanField for string-based fields

noncompliant.code:
from django.db import models
class MyModel(models.Model):
    name = models.CharField(max_length=50)
    is_null = models.NullBooleanField()
noncompliant.description: Using NullBooleanField on a string-based field

compliant.description: Using CharField with null=True and blank=True instead of NullBooleanField

why_is_this_an_issue: Using NullBooleanField on string-based fields can lead to unexpected behavior, as it treats null and False as the same value.
how_to_fix: Use a CharField or related field type instead of NullBooleanField for string-based fields

metadata.title: NullTrue should not be used on string-based fields in Django models
